NAVAREA XIX 134/25

 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  111830 UTC OCT 25
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 72-26.50N 020-08.10E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 71-21.80N 022-24.10E COSL PROSPECTOR
 66-00.10N 007-48.10E SCARABEO 8
 65-06.50N 006-47.40E FLOATEL SUPERIOR
 65-01.10N 007-22.60E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
  
 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　132/25
